title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: minimal YAML file looks like : Unknown keys ignored misha.browser, safe add project-specific metadata YAML needed.
code: profiles:   local:     misha_root: /path/to/misha  start:   gene: Tbx5   span_bp: 2000000  ui:   title: "Genome Browser"   smooth_window_default: 10  plot:   iterator: 32   extraction_mode: fixed   target_points: 4000  navigator:   source: intervs.global.tss   label_field: geneSymbol   extension: 1000000  vtracks:   - name: signal.k27     src: chip.h3k27me3_track     func: sum     sshift: -140     eshift: 140  panels:   - name: signal     type: data     tracks: [signal.k27]     plot_type: line     height: 3  vlines:   - name: peaks     source: file     file: peaks.tsv     color: grey50

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: profiles section lets define environment-specific roots: Key behaviors: specify profile, loader auto-selects server misha_root exists, otherwise falls back local. base_dir resolved relative YAML file; data_dir resolved relative base_dir. vlines.file paths resolved relative data_dir. selected profile stored internally ._profile resolved misha_root applied automatically.
code: profiles:   local:     base_dir: "../.."     data_dir: "data"     misha_root: /home/user/mm10   server:     base_dir: ".."     data_dir: "."     misha_root: /misha_dbs/mm10/trackdb/

text: start block sets initial view: Alternatively, can provide explicit coordinates: gene provided, navigator source used find gene window centered span_bp (navigator extension).

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Extraction modes control misha.browser samples tracks applies smoothing.
code: plot:   iterator: 32   expansion: 0   extraction_mode: fixed   target_points: 4000   smoothing_bp: 3200

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Span: span = end - start (bp) Dynamic iterator: iterator = max(base_iter, ceiling(span / target_points)) Smooth slider (state): smooth_window = input Smooth value (units: bins fixed mode, bp dynamic_smooth) Dynamic smooth window: smoothing_bp = smooth_window set, else plot.smoothing_bp

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Step--step process: Set iterator = base_iter (plot.iterator). Extract raw values misha iterator (bin size). Apply panel transforms order. smooth transform exists Smooth set, replace window smooth_window (bins). Apply per-track transforms defined YAML vtracks[].transforms (rules ). Effective smoothing bp smooth_window * iterator rolling window measured bins. Best func=sum values scale bin size.

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Step--step process: Compute iterator = max(base_iter, ceiling(span / target_points)). Extract raw values misha dynamic iterator. Remove smooth transforms (panel + per-track YAML transforms) avoid double-smoothing. Apply remaining transforms order. dynamic iterator provides inherent smoothing aggregation, explicit smooth transforms skipped.

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Step--step process: Compute iterator = max(base_iter, ceiling(span / target_points)). Compute smoothing_bp set vtrack iterator shifts sshift = -round(smoothing_bp/2), eshift = round(smoothing_bp/2) tracks panel. Extract raw values misha dynamic iterator shifted vtracks. Remove smooth transforms (panel + per-track YAML transforms); apply remaining transforms. Like dynamic, also updates vtrack sshift/eshift using smoothing_bp (current smooth window state).

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: expansion expands plotting region sides (total expansion bp).

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Colors matched name. value ends .k4 .k27, base name without suffix also checked (example, silicus.k27 falls back silicus). value missing, deterministic hash-based color generated; _default used fallback.

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: vtrack entry validated creation. Common fields: Supported patterns: Standard vtracks: name, src, func, optional params, filter, iterator shifts (sshift, eshift, dim). Sequence-based vtracks (src required) kmer.*, pwm.*, masked.* functions. Expression handling uses single expression field. src/func present, wraps created vtrack extraction. src func given, defines pure expression vtrack. example, correct: creates chipseq_q global.percentile.max extracts -log2(1 - chipseq_q). can also inline vtracks expressions directly panels.tracks using objects include src/func expr.
code: vtracks:   - name: signal.k27     src: chip.h3k27me3_track     func: sum     sshift: -140     eshift: 140 browser <- browser_create(misha_root = .misha$GROOT) %>%   browser_add_vtrack(     "chipseq_q",     src = "chipseq.ctcf.LCL.hsa81.3",     func = "global.percentile.max",     expression = "-log2(1 - chipseq_q)"   ) %>%   browser_add_panel(     name = "chipseq",     tracks = "chipseq_q",     plot_type = "line",     height = 2   )

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Grouping faceting (inst/examples/silicus.yaml): pattern uses named capture groups add metadata columns. color_by controls mapped aesthetic (track, source, mark). facet_by uses scales = "free_y" facet can scale independently. Horizontal lines can added data panels:
code: panels:   - name: signal     type: data     tracks:       - silicus.k27       - silicus.k4     plot_type: line     height: 4     alpha: 0.8     linewidth: 0.7     show_legend: true grouping:   color_by: source   pattern: "^(?<source>.+)\\.(?<mark>.+)$"   overrides:     norm.k27:       source: norm       mark: k27 facet_by: mark hlines:   - "y": 6     color: black     linetype: solid     label: "Midpoint"   - stat: mean     color: blue     linetype: dashed     label: "Mean"

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Vertical line layers can sourced several ways: Supported sources: file: CSV/TSV/BED chrom, start, end. intervals: misha interval track (intervals: intervs.global.tss). inline: specify intervals list inline coordinates. current: adds lines current region boundaries. show_bounds toggles whether bounds shown just midpoint.
code: vlines:   - name: peaks     source: file     file: peaks.tsv     color: grey50     linetype: dashed     show_bounds: true     enabled: true

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: Transforms run order applied first panel level vtrack transforms list. Available transform types: smooth: rolling mean (window, optional align). log2 / log10: log transform offset (default 1). sqrt: square root floor 0. zscore: mean/SD normalization. minmax: normalize 0..1. clip: clamp [min, max]. quantile: clamp probs (default c(0.01, 0.99)). expr: custom R expression using x pos. Example: Scale controls per panel: ylim uses coord_cartesian data outside range clipped rather dropped. y_labels supports numeric (default), percent, scientific, comma. plot_type can line, area, point, histogram.
code: transforms:   - type: smooth     window: 10   - type: log2     offset: 1   - type: clip     min: 0     max: 10 ylim: [0, 10] y_title: "ATAC" y_labels: percent

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: file inst/examples/silicus.yaml combines major features: Multiple profiles path resolution. Dozens vtracks func=sum iterator shifts. faceted data panel grouped source mark. Additional panels ATAC, GC/CpG content, repeats, gene annotations. Vertical line overlays loaded CSV/TSV files. Use reference building full browser configuration.

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML
text: can happen : - viewing region data - values NA - region outside chromosome bounds Solution: 1. Navigate different region gene 2. Check track data: misha::gextract("track.name", gintervals(1, 0, 1e6)) 3. Verify chromosome names match (e.g., chr1 vs 1)

title: Configuring misha.browser with YAML

title: Interactive Genome Browser for Misha Tracks
text: YAML Configuration: Define entire browser setup single YAML file Virtual Tracks: Full support misha virtual tracks expressions, aggregation functions, filters Track Expressions: Arithmetic operations tracks (e.g., "track1 / track2") Multiple Panel Types: Data panels, gene annotations, intervals, ideograms Data Transforms: Smooth, log2, log10, zscore, clip, quantile normalization, custom expressions Horizontal/Vertical Lines: Add reference lines (fixed values computed statistics) region markers Faceting & Grouping: Group tracks metadata regex pattern matching Interactive Shiny App: Navigate, zoom, highlight, explore data File Uploads: Upload intervals PSSM files directly Shiny app Caching: Efficient data extraction automatic memory disk caching

code: # Profile settings (for different environments) profiles:   local:     misha_root: /path/to/local/misha   server:     misha_root: /path/to/server/misha  # Starting position start:   gene: Tbx5   span_bp: 2000000  # UI settings ui:   title: "My Genome Browser"   smooth_window_default: 10  # Plot settings plot:   iterator: 32   extraction_mode: fixed  # or "dynamic" or "dynamic_smooth"   theme: bw  # Navigator for gene selection navigator:   source: intervs.global.tss   label_field: geneSymbol  # Virtual track definitions vtracks:   - name: signal.k27     src: chip.h3k27me3_track     func: sum     sshift: -140     eshift: 140  # Panel definitions panels:   - name: signal     type: data     tracks: [signal.k27, signal.k4]     transforms:       - type: smooth         window: 10       - type: log2         offset: 1     plot_type: line     height: 3  # Vertical lines vlines:   - name: regions     source: file     file: regions.csv     color: grey50

title: Interactive Genome Browser for Misha Tracks
text: misha.browser supports full misha virtual track system: expression field defaults vtrack name can valid misha expression. behavior inferred: src/func present, expression wraps created vtrack extraction. src func given, expression defines pure expression vtrack. example, correct: creates chipseq_q global.percentile.max extracts -log2(1 - chipseq_q).
code: vtracks:   # Standard vtrack with aggregation   - name: signal_sum     src: chip.track     func: sum     sshift: -100    # Extend aggregation window     eshift: 100    # Quantile aggregation   - name: signal_median     src: chip.track     func: quantile     params: 0.5    # Vtrack with expression wrapper (e.g., pmax, log2)   # With src + func present, expression wraps the created vtrack   - name: norm.k27     src: at.EB4_norm_300     func: sum     expression: "pmax(norm.k27, 0)"  # Clamp to >= 0    # Sequence-based vtrack (no src needed)   - name: gc_content     func: kmer.frac     params:       kmer: "GC"    # PWM motif scoring   - name: motif_score     func: pwm.max     params:       pssm: motif.csv       bidirect: true    # Pure track expression (no misha vtrack created)   - name: normalized     expression: "track1 - background"    # Vtrack with filter   - name: unmasked     src: chip.track     func: avg     filter: masked_regions browser <- browser_create(misha_root = .misha$GROOT) %>%   browser_add_vtrack(     "chipseq_q",     src = "chipseq.ctcf.LCL.hsa81.3",     func = "global.percentile.max",     expression = "-log2(1 - chipseq_q)"   ) %>%   browser_add_panel(     name = "chipseq",     tracks = "chipseq_q",     plot_type = "line",     height = 2   )

text: panel name now appears legend title data panels (e.g. panel named "signal" shows “signal” track-name list legend). browser_add_panel() gains show_name (default FALSE), renders panel name bold left-side strip label (UCSC-style). default avoid visual noise; opt show_name = TRUE. browser_add_panel() accepts type = "ggplot" plot argument render arbitrary user-supplied static ggplot object panel. Useful sample-metadata heatmaps, logos, annotations don’t depend genomic region. plot static (re-render navigation), gets vline/highlight overlay, saved YAML — browser_save_config() drops ggplot panels warning listing dropped names. browser_add_panel() gains raw (default NULL, inheriting cfg$plot$raw), renders panel without smoothing surfaces NAs gaps. Useful sparse data tracks smoothing misleading. Precedence render time: Shiny Raw view checkbox > per-panel raw > global cfg$plot$raw > FALSE. Shiny UI gains “Raw view” checkbox next smooth slider. active, smoothing skipped session-wide smooth slider visually disabled.

title: misha.browser 0.1.1
text: Intervals panels: show_direction option plot intervals arrows (triangles) strand, directional features like CTCF motifs. Uses strand column (BED col 6 misha intervals). direction_field specify custom column name. Simplified browser_add_vtrack() YAML vtrack configuration use single inferred expression field. src/func present, expression wraps created vtrack extraction; otherwise defines pure expression vtrack. Legacy expr still accepted compatibility alias.
